description: Velocx NZ is a performance swimwear retailer bringing elite global brands to New Zealand swimmers. Featuring Jaked, a premium Italian swimwear brand trusted by competitive athletes, Velocx helps swimmers train harder, race faster, and perform at their best.
tone: authoritative yet energetic, performance-driven, confident, aspirational, community-focused, athlete-first mindset

brand_positioning.velocx_role: trusted curator and performance authority in NZ swimwear
brand_positioning.jaked_positioning: elite Italian performance swimwear designed for competitive swimmers and race performance

target_audience.primary: competitive swimmers and triathletes in New Zealand aged 16–40
target_audience.secondary: fitness swimmers and aspiring athletes who want high-performance gear
target_audience.entry_level: younger swimmers or beginners influenced by elite athlete content
psychographics: wants to improve performance and times
inspired by elite athletes and competition
cares about quality gear and progression

content_pillars.details: tips, drills, technique breakdowns, race strategies
show Jaked in action, benefits, performance angles, not hard selling
adapt TikTok/IG trends into swimming niche

content_types.description: strong 1-3 second hook, problem or POV-based
show Jaked during training or racing naturally
explain why performance swimwear matters (without hard selling)

_note: Instagram and TikTok are in platforms config but credentials not yet configured. Update 'platforms' array and add credentials to config/credentials/velocx_nz.env when ready.
